title: Networking: NVLink 6, Rubin Scale Out
title_translation: 网络：NVLink 6 与 Rubin 横向扩展

paragraphs.source: NVIDIA’s gen-on-gen innovations are evolutionary and not revolutionary. With GPU scale-up and scale-out bandwidth doubling approximately every 18 months, the copper infrastructure in NVIDIA racks are being innovated to accommodate higher bandwidth workloads. Scale-up network infrastructure will eventually involve optics to build larger world sizes, but that is the topic of a separate article.

pro.text: 英伟达（NVIDIA）的代际创新属于演进式而非革命性。随着 GPU 纵向扩展（scale-up）和横向扩展（scale-out）带宽大约每 18 个月翻倍一次，英伟达机柜内的铜缆基础设施也在不断创新，以承载更高带宽的工作负载。纵向扩展网络基础设施最终将引入光通信技术以构建更大的集群规模（world sizes），但这将是另一篇文章的主题。

pro.text: 下表展示了纵向扩展和横向扩展网络速度的演进历程。Vera Rubin 采用的 NVLink 6 通过在相同数量的铜缆上实现双向信号传输，使 NVLink 带宽翻倍——实际上每个 NVLink 提供了 4 条 200G 通道。后文将对此进行详细探讨。

paragraphs.source: The doubling of bandwidth per logical GPU from NVLink 5 in GB300 NVL72 to NVLink 6 in Vera Rubin NVL72 are made possible by using a simultaneous bi-directional SerDes for the copper backplane instead of increasing the modulation or baud rate. Whereas NVLink 5 delivers 224G per electrical lane, NVLink 6.0 delivers 448G per electrical lane. Each electrical lane is one differential pair (DP) consisting of two conductors that carry equal magnitude, and opposite polarity signals.

pro.text: 从 GB300 NVL72 的 NVLink 5 到 Vera Rubin NVL72 的 NVLink 6，每个逻辑 GPU 带宽的翻倍是通过在铜缆背板上采用同步双向 SerDes 实现的，而非通过提高调制方式或波特率。NVLink 5 每个电学通道提供 224G 带宽，而 NVLink 6.0 每个电学通道提供 448G 带宽。每个电学通道由一个差分对（DP）组成，包含两个传输等幅反相信号的导体。

paragraphs.source: In optics, bidirectional interconnect can be achieved by integrating an optical circulator to a transceiver as discussed in our TPUv7 article published late last year. The circulator works by routing the inbound and outbound signal onto separate paths, ensuring no overlaps between both at the photodiode receiver. Bidirectional interconnect is, however, much trickier in the copper domain. A circulator cannot be used as copper cables are linear transmission lines, which means that the inbound and outbound signals will be summed at the receiver through superposition. The receiver at each end of the copper wire therefore needs a mechanism to separate the local TX from the local RX.

pro.text: 在光学领域，正如我们在去年年底发布的TPUv7 文章中所讨论的，可以通过在收发器中集成光环形器来实现双向互连。环形器的工作原理是将输入和输出信号引导至不同的路径，从而确保两者在光电二极管接收器处不会重叠。然而，双向互连在铜缆领域要棘手得多。由于铜缆是线性传输线，无法使用环形器，这意味着输入和输出信号会通过叠加在接收端求和。因此，铜缆每一端的接收器都需要一种机制来将本地发送（TX）信号与本地接收（RX）信号分离。

However, if NVIDIA were to continue using the 200G SerDes, doubling the bandwidth would mean doubling the number of copper cables at the backplane, which is a tall order for several reasons.

pro.text: 双向信号传输的挑战在于，回声消除必须经过精确校准，否则本地发送（TX）信号副本生成过程中的轻微延迟就可能导致链路故障。然而，如果英伟达继续使用 200G SerDes，带宽翻倍将意味着背板上的铜质线缆数量也要翻倍，出于多方面原因，这都是一个极大的挑战。

To double scale-up bandwidth while staying on regular 200G SerDes would require the backplane to double to ten thousand copper cables: only further increasing the manufacturing complexity and likelihood of failure of the system.

paragraphs.source: Although the NVLink 6 Switch used in the VR NVL72 system delivers the same per switch 28.8T aggregate bandwidth as NVLink 5 Switch, the SerDes speed on the NVLink 6 Switch is double the SerDes speed of NVLink 5 Switch but with the same number of DPs. As such, in order to deliver double the aggregate scale-up bandwidth required for NVLink 6, Vera Rubin NVL72 racks will contain double the number of NVLink Switches as compared to GB200 racks. This translates to four NVLink Switch chips per tray on 9 switch trays, or 36 NVLink Switch chips in each rack.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Although the NVLink 6 Switch used in the VR NVL72 system delivers the same per switch 28.8T aggregate bandwidth as NVLink 5 Switch, the SerDes speed on the NVLink 6 Switch is double the SerDes speed of NVLink 5 Switch but with the same number of DPs. As such, in order to deliver double the aggregate scale-up bandwidth required for NVLink 6, Vera Rubin NVL72 racks will contain double the number of NVLink Switches as compared to GB200 racks. This translates to four NVLink Switch chips per tray on 9 switch trays, or 36 NVLink Switch chips in each rack.

pro.text: 虽然 VR NVL72 系统中使用的 NVLink 6 交换机与 NVLink 5 交换机一样，单台交换机的总带宽均为 28.8T，但 NVLink 6 交换机的 SerDes 速度是 NVLink 5 的两倍，且具有相同数量的 DP。因此，为了提供 NVLink 6 所需的两倍纵向扩展总带宽，Vera Rubin NVL72 机柜包含的 NVLink 交换机数量将是 GB200 机柜的两倍。这意味着在 9 个交换机托盘中，每个托盘配备 4 颗 NVLink 交换机芯片，即每个机柜共有 36 颗 NVLink 交换机芯片。

paragraphs.source: The NVLink 6 Switch board is liquid cooled and will be covered with a cold plate, which is a single module. Connected to the NVSwitch tray is the system management module (SMM) that comes with a CPU and acts as a host to the switch tray. The switch tray to SMM connection uses flyover cables, but this is the only flyover cable connection required in the entire Vera Rubin NVL72 system. Given that the PCIe connection is lower speed and the NVLink Switch tray contains relatively few modules, assembly of the switch tray is unlikely to be challenging.

paragraphs.source: As previously explained, high speed signals require better PCB materials, especially for NVLink 6 which has much lower tolerance for insertion loss given the use of bidirectional signaling. The number of lanes between the PaladinHD2 connectors and the NVLink Switch also creates complexity for PCB design. Hence, the NVLink 6 Switch board PCB is upgraded to 32 layers with M8+ graded CCL - minimally LDK2 glass fiber cloth or potentially Quartz fiber cloth.

The number of lanes between the PaladinHD2 connectors and the NVLink Switch also creates complexity for PCB design. Hence, the NVLink 6 Switch board PCB is upgraded to 32 layers with M8+ graded CCL - minimally LDK2 glass fiber cloth or potentially Quartz fiber cloth.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As previously explained, high speed signals require better PCB materials, especially for NVLink 6 which has much lower tolerance for insertion loss given the use of bidirectional signaling. The number of lanes between the PaladinHD2 connectors and the NVLink Switch also creates complexity for PCB design. Hence, the NVLink 6 Switch board PCB is upgraded to 32 layers with M8+ graded CCL - minimally LDK2 glass fiber cloth or potentially Quartz fiber cloth.

pro.text: 正如前文所述，高速信号需要更好的 PCB 材料，特别是对于 NVLink 6 而言，由于采用了双向信号传输，其对插入损耗（insertion loss）的容忍度大大降低。PaladinHD2 连接器与 NVLink 交换机之间的通道数量也增加了 PCB 设计的复杂性。因此，NVLink 6 交换机板的 PCB 升级到了 32 层，并采用 M8+ 级覆铜板（CCL）——至少使用 LDK2 玻纤布，甚至可能使用石英纤维布。

paragraphs.source: Zooming out, backplane copper cables are used to connect NVLink Switch trays to the GPU trays for the VR NVL72 system. Although the bandwidth doubles, with bi-directional SerDes, the number of cables required does not change from the GB300 backplane generation to the Vera Rubin NVL72 backplane generation. The number of connectors and the number of DPs per connector also does not change from Grace Blackwell NVL72 to VR NVL72.

pro.text: 从宏观角度看，VR NVL72 系统使用背板铜缆将 NVLink 交换机托盘与 GPU 托盘相连。尽管带宽翻倍，但得益于双向 SerDes，从 GB300 背板世代到 Vera Rubin NVL72 背板世代，所需的线缆数量并未改变。从 Grace Blackwell NVL72 到 VR NVL72，连接器的数量以及每个连接器的 DP 数量也保持不变。

paragraphs.source: While the VR NVL72 system features GPUs and scale-up switches that are connected by copper cables, the VR HGX system features servers consisting of eight Rubin GPUs and four NVLink Switch chips. The second meaningful difference between the NVL72 and HGX deployments is that the former has a scale-out bandwidth of 1.6T per GPU while the latter only has a scale-out bandwidth of 800G per GPU. How is it that all Rubin 200 deployments use CX-9 NICs even though some deployments have half the per GPU scale-out bandwidth?

pro.text: VR NVL72 系统的 GPU 和 Scale-up 交换机通过铜缆连接，而 VR HGX 系统则采用由 8 颗 Rubin GPU 和 4 颗 NVLink 交换机芯片组成的服务器。NVL72 和 HGX 部署之间的第二个显著区别在于，前者每颗 GPU 拥有 1.6T 的横向扩展（Scale-out）带宽，而后者每颗 GPU 仅有 800G 的横向扩展带宽。既然部分部署的单 GPU 横向扩展带宽只有一半，为何所有 Rubin 200 部署都使用 CX-9 网卡？

paragraphs.source: The HGX Rubin NVL8 server consists of eight 800G CX-9 NIC packages – one NIC per GPU – which means that the scale-out bandwidth does not increase from its predecessor, the HGX B300 server. The Vera Rubin NVL72 deployment on the other hand doubles the per GPU scale-out bandwidth to 1.6T, but not by doubling the bandwidth per NIC. Rather, the “1.6T NIC” attached to each Rubin chip is comprised of two 800G CX-9 packages that is connected to the Vera CPU by PCIe Gen 6.0 lanes.

Rather, the “1.6T NIC” attached to each Rubin chip is comprised of two 800G CX-9 packages that is connected to the Vera CPU by PCIe Gen 6.0 lanes.

pro.text: HGX Rubin NVL8 服务器包含 8 个 800G CX-9 网卡封装——每颗 GPU 对应一个网卡——这意味着其 Scale-out 带宽较其前代产品 HGX B300 服务器并未提升。相比之下，Vera Rubin NVL72 部署将单 GPU 的 Scale-out 带宽翻倍至 1.6T，但这并非通过翻倍单个网卡的带宽实现的。相反，连接到每颗 Rubin 芯片的“1.6T 网卡”由两个 800G CX-9 封装组成，并通过 PCIe Gen 6.0 通道连接到 Vera CPU。

paragraphs.source: Broadly, there are three flavors of scale-out deployments for Vera Rubin NVL72. We have InfiniBand-based clusters which employ the NVIDIA Quantum series of switches, NVIDIA Ethernet-based clusters employing Spectrum series switches and lastly, non-Nvidia Ethernet such as Tomahawk-based, Cisco Silicon One or Teralynx-based Ethernet switches. Some Ethernet-based clusters deployed by hyperscalers will use AECs for NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connections, while other Ethernet-based clusters using only optical interconnects will usually adopt a multi-plane and multi-rail networking architecture.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Broadly, there are three flavors of scale-out deployments for Vera Rubin NVL72. We have InfiniBand-based clusters which employ the NVIDIA Quantum series of switches, NVIDIA Ethernet-based clusters employing Spectrum series switches and lastly, non-Nvidia Ethernet such as Tomahawk-based, Cisco Silicon One or Teralynx-based Ethernet switches. Some Ethernet-based clusters deployed by hyperscalers will use AECs for NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connections, while other Ethernet-based clusters using only optical interconnects will usually adopt a multi-plane and multi-rail networking architecture. What is particularly noteworthy about Vera Rubin NVL72 deployments, however, is that it is the first Nvidia GPU generation where we will be seeing some Co-Packaged-Optics (CPO) deployments in the scale-out backend network.

paragraphs.source: For the Vera Rubin NVL72 deployment however, there are two 800G OSFP cages per GPU for a total of 1.6T per GPU bandwidth. Having two 800G logical ports per GPU is advantageous because it allows multi-plane network deployments without complex fiber management – by splitting one logical GPU two ways to two different leaf switches. As such, larger network clusters can be built with two 800G logical ports than if only one 1.6T logical port were used. paragraphs.source: Aside from the X800-Q3400 air-cooled switch, NVIDIA will also offer a CPO version, which is the X800-Q3450 containing the same 144 ports of 800G. As pointed out earlier, what is unique about both switches is that each switch box consists of four 28.8T Quantum-3 Switch ASICs for a total of 115.2T per box switching capacity. When used in conjunction with the VR NVL72 servers, the signal from the NIC at the leaf layer is split four ways – 200G each way – to each switch ASIC within the box. Such a configuration bears logical equivalence to a 4-plane network architecture.

pro.text: 除了 X800-Q3400 风冷交换机外，英伟达（NVIDIA）还将提供 CPO 版本，即包含相同 144 个 800G 端口的 X800-Q3450。如前所述，这两款交换机的独特之处在于，每个交换机机箱都由四个 28.8T Quantum-3 交换机 ASIC 组成，单机箱总交换容量达到 115.2T。当与 VR NVL72 服务器配合使用时，来自叶层网卡（NIC）的信号被分成四路——每路 200G——分别连接到机箱内的每个交换机 ASIC。这种配置在逻辑上等同于四平面网络架构。

paragraphs.source: As discussed in our recent deep dive article on co-packaged optics, the first reason is that a significant amount of power can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content. If we compare the power consumption of one 800G DR4 optical transceiver (16-17W) to the power required by optical engines (OEs) and external light source (ELS) modules to delivery an equivalent 800G of bandwidth in the scale-out network, we see an average ~70% reduction in power used for optical transceivers. Taking a step back, this would translate to 10% in savings for the total networking equipment power consumption in a 3-Layer HGX Rubin NVL8 cluster.

inline_elements.text: deep dive article on co-packaged optics,

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As discussed in our recent [deep dive article on co-packaged optics,](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/co-packaged-optics-cpo-book-scaling) the first reason is that a significant amount of power can be saved by eliminating most of the transceiver content. If we compare the power consumption of one 800G DR4 optical transceiver (16-17W) to the power required by optical engines (OEs) and external light source (ELS) modules to delivery an equivalent 800G of bandwidth in the scale-out network, we see an average ~70% reduction in power used for optical transceivers. Taking a step back, this would translate to 10% in savings for the total networking equipment power consumption in a 3-Layer HGX Rubin NVL8 cluster. This reduction in networking equipment power consumption is however relatively insignificant and amounts to only ~1% of total cluster power consumption because the server’s power budget dominates the equation.

This reduction in networking equipment power consumption is however relatively insignificant and amounts to only ~1% of total cluster power consumption because the server’s power budget dominates the equation.

pro.text: 正如我们在最近那篇关于共封装光学（CPO）的深度解析文章，中所讨论的，首要原因在于通过消除大部分光收发器组件，可以节省大量功耗。如果我们将单个 800G DR4 光收发器（16-17W）的功耗，与在 Scale-out 网络中提供等效 800G 带宽所需的光学引擎（OE）及外部光源（ELS）模块的功耗进行对比，可以发现光收发器环节的功耗平均降低了约 70%。从全局来看，这相当于为一个三层 HGX Rubin NVL8 集群节省了 10% 的网络设备总功耗。

paragraphs.source: The second benefit is a reduction in cost stemming from eliminating almost all transceivers. There is even more room for price reduction if we are looking at NVIDIA LinkX transceivers, which tend to be priced at significant premium to their generic equivalent. If we compare total networking costs for a 3-Layer network with and without CPO-based switches in the scale-out domain, we see an average of ~75% reduction in transceiver costs. However, as with the power savings above, such costs savings tend not to move the needle dramatically considering the full cluster costs.

pro.text: 第二个优势是由于几乎消除了所有收发器而带来的成本降低。如果考虑到英伟达（NVIDIA）LinkX 收发器，降价空间会更大，因为这些收发器的价格往往比同类通用产品有显著溢价。如果我们对比 Scale-out 领域中采用和不采用基于 CPO 交换机的三层网络总成本，可以看到收发器成本平均降低了约 75%。然而，与上述功耗节省的情况类似，考虑到整个集群的总成本，这类成本节省往往无法产生决定性的影响。

paragraphs.source: Increased overall network reliability is another compelling point. Transceivers can be unreliable, with a large cluster certain to have ongoing link flaps. Meta’s study presented at ECOC showed strong reliability results over 15M 400G port-device hours, which is about equivalent 15 CPO switches tested for 11 months in a lab. It is an encouraging start – but we think this point could get stronger with more in field test deployments.

[Meta’s study presented at ECOC](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/i/178153689/when-will-cpo-be-ready-for-primetime) showed strong reliability results over 15M 400G port-device hours, which is about equivalent 15 CPO switches tested for 11 months in a lab. It is an encouraging start – but we think this point could get stronger with more in field test deployments.

pro.text: 提升整体网络可靠性是另一个引人注目的论点。收发器可能并不可靠，大型集群肯定会不断出现链路抖动（link flaps）。Meta 在 ECOC 上展示的研究显示，在超过 1500 万个 400G 端口设备小时（port-device hours）中，可靠性表现强劲，这大约相当于 15 台 CPO 交换机在实验室中测试 11 个月的结果。这是一个令人鼓舞的开始，但我们认为，随着更多现场测试部署的开展，这一论点将更具说服力。

paragraphs.source: The last factor in favor of adoption of CPO that we would like to mention is the fact that some of Nvidia’s CPO switch SKUs contain the integrated fiber shuffle and can simplify the installation and maintenance of multi-plane network architectures. Recall that the SN6800 contains four Switch ASICs in a multi-plane configuration connected to ports via an integrated fiber shuffle, delivering 409.6T aggregate bandwidth, while the SN6810 uses one Switch ASIC, but without any integrated fiber shuffle, to deliver 102.4T aggregate bandwidth.

pro.text: 我们想提到的支持采用 CPO 的最后一个因素是，某些英伟达（NVIDIA）的 CPO 交换机 SKU 包含集成的光纤重排（fiber shuffle），可以简化多平面网络架构的安装和维护。回想一下，SN6800 在多平面配置中包含四个交换机 ASIC，通过集成的光纤重排连接到端口，提供 409.6T 的总聚合带宽；而 SN6810 使用一个交换机 ASIC，但不带任何集成的光纤重排，提供 102.4T 的总聚合带宽。

paragraphs.source: For the SN6800 CPO switch, even though the bandwidth engine responsible for converting electrical to optical signals scales from 1.6T to 3.2T or 2x compared to the SN6600 switch, each 3.2T OE within the SN6800 switch box is split into four 800G logical ports that fan out within the box itself and exit the front panel through fiber connectors. This allows a single 1.6T GPU to fan out to two independent switch planes. In fact, the SN6800 switch box consists of four ASICs, which is similar to the X800-Q3400 switch box.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For the SN6800 CPO switch, even though the bandwidth engine responsible for converting electrical to optical signals scales from 1.6T to 3.2T or 2x compared to the SN6600 switch, each 3.2T OE within the SN6800 switch box is split into four 800G logical ports that fan out within the box itself and exit the front panel through fiber connectors. This allows a single 1.6T GPU to fan out to two independent switch planes. In fact, the SN6800 switch box consists of four ASICs, which is similar to the X800-Q3400 switch box.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For the SN6800 CPO switch, even though the bandwidth engine responsible for converting electrical to optical signals scales from 1.6T to 3.2T or 2x compared to the SN6600 switch, each 3.2T OE within the SN6800 switch box is split into four 800G logical ports that fan out within the box itself and exit the front panel through fiber connectors. This allows a single 1.6T GPU to fan out to two independent switch planes. In fact, the SN6800 switch box consists of four ASICs, which is similar to the X800-Q3400 switch box.

pro.text: 对于 SN6800 CPO 交换机，尽管负责电信号转光信号的带宽引擎规模从 SN6600 的 1.6T 翻倍扩展到了 3.2T，但 SN6800 交换机箱内的每个 3.2T 光学引擎（OE）被拆分为四个 800G 逻辑端口，在机箱内部进行扇出并从前面板的光纤接口引出。这使得单个 1.6T GPU 能够扇出到两个独立的交换平面。事实上，SN6800 交换机箱由四个 ASIC 组成，这与 X800-Q3400 交换机箱类似。

paragraphs.source: For Meta, we think the VR NVL72 deployments will comprise only of non-scheduled fabric (NSF) clusters built using Tomahawk 6-based Minipack-4 OCP Rack 102.4T switches in each datacenter. While Meta will be using optics to connect all the switches within its cluster, it will use 1.6T AECs for NIC-to-TOR connections once 1.6T AECs become broadly available in the market. We expect the 1.6T AEC ramp to happen in the second half of calendar year 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For Meta, we think the VR NVL72 deployments will comprise only of non-scheduled fabric (NSF) clusters built using Tomahawk 6-based Minipack-4 OCP Rack 102.4T switches in each datacenter. While Meta will be using optics to connect all the switches within its cluster, it will use 1.6T AECs for NIC-to-TOR connections once 1.6T AECs become broadly available in the market. We expect the 1.6T AEC ramp to happen in the second half of calendar year 2026.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For Meta, we think the VR NVL72 deployments will comprise only of non-scheduled fabric (NSF) clusters built using Tomahawk 6-based Minipack-4 OCP Rack 102.4T switches in each datacenter. While Meta will be using optics to connect all the switches within its cluster, it will use 1.6T AECs for NIC-to-TOR connections once 1.6T AECs become broadly available in the market. We expect the 1.6T AEC ramp to happen in the second half of calendar year 2026.

pro.text: 对于 Meta，我们认为其 VR NVL72 部署将仅由非调度网络架构（Non-scheduled fabric，NSF）集群组成，这些集群在每个数据中心都使用基于 Tomahawk 6 的 Minipack-4 OCP 机架 102.4T 交换机。虽然 Meta 将使用光模块连接其集群内的所有交换机，但一旦 1.6T AEC 在市场上广泛普及，它将在网卡到机架顶端交换机（TOR）的连接中使用 1.6T AEC。我们预计 1.6T AEC 的放量将发生在 2026 日历年下半年。

paragraphs.source: The catch is that 102.4T Minipack-4 switches may not be shipped in time for Vera Rubin NVL72 rack deployments, and if this were to be the case, some NSF clusters will be shipped using 51.2T Minipack-3 switches instead. This means that gearboxes within the AECs will have to be used to convert 200G per lane SerDes speed at the NIC to 100G per lane SerDes speed at the switch.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The catch is that 102.4T Minipack-4 switches may not be shipped in time for Vera Rubin NVL72 rack deployments, and if this were to be the case, some NSF clusters will be shipped using 51.2T Minipack-3 switches instead. This means that gearboxes within the AECs will have to be used to convert 200G per lane SerDes speed at the NIC to 100G per lane SerDes speed at the switch.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The catch is that 102.4T Minipack-4 switches may not be shipped in time for Vera Rubin NVL72 rack deployments, and if this were to be the case, some NSF clusters will be shipped using 51.2T Minipack-3 switches instead. This means that gearboxes within the AECs will have to be used to convert 200G per lane SerDes speed at the NIC to 100G per lane SerDes speed at the switch.

pro.text: 棘手之处在于，102.4T 的 Minipack-4 交换机可能无法赶在 Vera Rubin NVL72 机柜部署时及时出货。如果情况确实如此，部分 NSF 集群将改为采用 51.2T 的 Minipack-3 交换机。这意味着必须利用 AEC 内部的速率转换芯片（Gearbox），将网卡（NIC）端每通道 200G 的 SerDes 速率转换为交换机端每通道 100G 的 SerDes 速率。

paragraphs.source: Meta will not be the only hyperscaler using 1.6T AECs for its VR200 deployments, however. We think xAI will use 1.6T AECs for both NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connectivity at the leaf, spine and core layers. It will be a single-plane network replacing most 1.6T transceivers at the switch boxes – and this can give Credo plenty of pricing power.

We think xAI will use 1.6T AECs for both NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connectivity at the leaf, spine and core layers. It will be a single-plane network replacing most 1.6T transceivers at the switch boxes – and this can give Credo plenty of pricing power.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Meta will not be the only hyperscaler using 1.6T AECs for its VR200 deployments, however. We think xAI will use 1.6T AECs for both NIC-to-TOR and switch-to-switch connectivity at the leaf, spine and core layers. It will be a single-plane network replacing most 1.6T transceivers at the switch boxes – and this can give Credo plenty of pricing power.

pro.text: 然而，Meta 并非唯一在 VR200 部署中使用 1.6T AEC 的超大规模云厂商（Hyperscaler）。我们认为 xAI 将在叶层（leaf）、脊层（spine）和核心层（core）的“网卡到 TOR”以及“交换机到交换机”连接中均使用 1.6T AEC。这将是一个单平面网络，取代了交换机箱体上的大部分 1.6T 光收发器——这能为 Credo 提供充足的定价权。
